letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice nimbuspay-202512

To the Billing Department, NimbusPay:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice nimbuspay-202512, covering the
billing period 2025-12-01 through 2025-12-31.

Per the governing clause (Amendment 1 §4):

    "Customer shall pay a one-time year-end tax filing fee of $1,200.00, invoiced in December 2025."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $10,000.00.
The invoice as billed totals $11,200.00, a discrepancy of $1,200.00.

Calculation:
  - Year-end tax filing fee: expected 0.00, billed 1200.00 (overcharge of 1200.00)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $1,200.00 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Customer shall pay a one-time year-end tax filing fee of $1,200.00, invoiced in December 2025.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 1200.00.
